items.en: The guardrailed Predictor γQ\gamma_{Q} may replace a numerical prediction with 𝚗𝚘𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗{\tt noprediction} when releasing that prediction is predicted to increase the log-odds of HH, relative to abstention, by at least α\alpha. In this sense, γQ\gamma_{Q} is intentionally consequence-sensitive. However, this does not contradict the consequence-invariance of the Predictor, as the Guardrail is part of the Scaffold and implements an explicit external safety criterion.
items.zh: Guardrailed Predictor γQ 可以在释放预测被预测会使 HH 的对数几率相对于弃权增加至少 α 时，用 𝚗𝚘𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 替换数值预测。在这个意义上，γQ 是有意对后果敏感的。然而，这并不与预测器的后果不变性相矛盾，因为 Guardrail 是 Scaffold 的一部分，并实现了一个明确的外部安全标准。

items.en: Fix a Boolean harmful event HH. To avoid infinite log-odds, probabilities entering logit expressions are clipped to [ε,1−ε][\varepsilon,1-\varepsilon] for some fixed ε∈(0,1/2)\varepsilon\in(0,1/2) before taking logits. The threshold Asafe>0A_{\rm safe}>0 is a normatively specified upper bound, in these clipped-logit units, on the acceptable trajectory-level residual log-odds increase in HH under the deployed SAI System, relative to the constant-abstention policy.
items.zh: 固定一个布尔有害事件 H。为避免无穷对数几率，在取 logit 之前，进入 logit 表达式的概率被裁剪到 [ε,1-ε]，其中 ε∈(0,1/2) 固定。阈值 Asafe>0 是一个规范性指定的上界，以这些裁剪后的 logit 单位表示，针对部署的 SAI 系统下 HH 相对于恒定弃权策略的可接受的轨迹级残差对数几率增加。

items.en: The threshold AsafeA_{\rm safe} is distinct from the per-query guardrail threshold α\alpha: α\alpha governs individual releases, while AsafeA_{\rm safe} governs the residual risk of the full guarded deployment trajectory.
items.zh: 阈值 Asafe 与每个查询的 guardrail 阈值 α 不同：α 控制单个释放，而 Asafe 控制完整受保护部署轨迹的残差风险。

items.en: Fix a Boolean harmful event HH. For a trained Predictor QQ, define its residual deployment risk with respect to HH as the trajectory-level log-odds excess of HH under the guarded policy γQ\gamma_{Q} over the constant-abstention policy:
items.zh: 固定一个布尔有害事件 H。对于训练好的预测器 Q，定义其相对于 H 的残差部署风险为受保护策略 γQ 下 HH 相对于恒定弃权策略的轨迹级对数几率超出：

items.en: where Q~≡𝚗𝚘𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗\widetilde{Q}\equiv{\tt noprediction} denotes the constant deployment policy that returns 𝚗𝚘𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗{\tt noprediction} for every query (the clipping convention of Def. 5.11 keeps this deployment risk finite). We call QQ dangerous for (H,Asafe)(H,A_{\rm safe}) when this residual risk exceeds the system-level threshold:
items.zh: 其中 Q~≡𝚗𝚘𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 表示对每个查询返回 𝚗𝚘𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 的恒定部署策略（定义 5.11 的裁剪约定使此部署风险有限）。当此残差风险超过系统级阈值时，我们称 Q 对 (H,Asafe) 是危险的：

items.en: The framework attributes only those harm contributions that releasing a prediction adds over withholding it, and no separate assumption on the absolute background-harm probability is required. If the harm event HH cannot be influenced by SAI outputs, the framework is vacuous in the harmless direction; both residual deployment risks are zero, and the dangerous set is empty.
items.zh: 该框架仅归因于释放预测相对于保留预测所增加的有害贡献，并且不需要对绝对背景有害概率进行单独假设。如果有害事件 H 不能被 SAI 输出影响，则该框架在无害方向上是空洞的；两个残差部署风险均为零，危险集为空。

items.en: The training objective is a weighted aggregate of per-query losses, J⁡(Q)=𝔼(x,y)∼π​[J(x,y)​(Q)]J(Q)=\mathbb{E}_{(x,y)\sim\pi}[J_{(x,y)}(Q)] for a training-query distribution π\pi over 𝚀\mathtt{Q}, and must give non-negligible weight to safety-relevant queries, with π\pi invariant to consequence-shuffling (i.e., π⁡(x,y)=π⁡(σ​x,σ​y)\pi(x,y)=\pi(\sigma x,\sigma y) for admissible symmetries σ\sigma, as per Def. 5.1). Fixing HH that specifies the harmful event to avoid, let 𝚀safe⊆𝚀\mathtt{Q}_{\rm safe}\subseteq\mathtt{Q} collect the interventional harm queries of the form used by the Scaffold’s Guardrail, including in particular every query whose released prediction can change the probability of HH relative to abstaining (releases on all other queries leaving that probability unchanged). We require π⁡(𝚀safe)≥τs\pi(\mathtt{Q}_{\rm safe})\geq\tau_{s} for a design parameter τs>0\tau_{s}>0.
items.zh: 训练目标是每个查询损失的加权聚合，J(Q)=E_{(x,y)~π}[J_{(x,y)}(Q)]，其中 π 是 𝚀 上的训练查询分布，并且必须给安全相关查询以不可忽略的权重，且 π 对后果重排不变（即，对于可允许对称性 σ，π(x,y)=π(σx,σy)，如定义 5.1 所述）。固定指定要避免的有害事件的 H，令 𝚀safe⊆𝚀 收集 Scaffold 的 Guardrail 所使用的干预有害查询形式，特别包括每个其释放的预测可以改变 HH 相对于弃权的概率的查询（所有其他查询上的释放保持该概率不变）。我们要求 π(𝚀safe)≥τs，其中 τs>0 是一个设计参数。

items.en: Req. 5.15 ensures that the sampling of constraints covers safety-relevant outcomes. The zero-loss target PnP_{n} fixes the Predictor’s answers on these queries, and the loss records aggregate disagreement with PnP_{n} on the same safety-relevant family. The subsequent loss band analysis asks how often deviations compatible with a given loss band can coordinate to support HH.
items.zh: 要求 5.15 确保约束的采样覆盖了安全相关的结果。零损失目标 Pn 固定了预测器在这些查询上的答案，损失记录与 Pn 在同一安全相关族上的总体不一致。随后的损失带分析询问给定损失带内允许的偏差如何能够协调以支持 H。

items.en: Every Scaffold-side selection step outside the Predictor—including deployment gating, tie-breaking among multiple performatively consistent fixed points of Def. 3.41, and any choice among internally coherent candidate outputs—must be governed by explicit, audited criteria. Acceptable criteria include fixed-data metrics such as the training objective JJ, calibration metrics on DnD_{n}, fixed-point residuals measuring how satisfied the performative prediction constraint is, static evaluation suites, and explicit safety-oriented quantities derived from the Predictor’s own harm estimates (e.g., preferring a candidate fixed point with lower predicted probability of entering the dangerous event HH).
items.zh: 预测器之外的每个 Scaffold 侧选择步骤——包括部署门控、定义 3.41 的多个执行一致固定点之间的打破平局，以及内部一致候选输出之间的任何选择——必须由明确、可审计的标准来管理。可接受的标准包括固定数据指标，如训练目标 J、Dn 上的校准指标、衡量执行预测约束满足程度的固定点残差、静态评估套件，以及从预测器自身有害估计中导出的明确安全导向量（例如，选择具有较低进入危险事件 H 的预测概率的候选固定点）。

items.en: Req. 5.17 ensures that any deployment-time agency is explicit and audited rather than implicit in the Predictor itself; choosing the safer among several performatively coherent candidates is therefore compatible with the present framework.99 9 This requirement is intended as sufficient for the present paper’s analysis; outlining necessary requirements for all acceptable scaffolds (alongside richer and more capable forms of agency built on top of the SAI Predictor) is left for future work.
items.zh: 要求 5.17 确保任何部署时的智能体性是明确且可审计的，而不是隐含在预测器本身中；因此在多个执行一致候选中选择更安全的候选与本框架兼容。9 9 此要求旨在作为本文分析的充分条件；为所有可接受的 Scaffold 概述必要条件（以及在 SAI 预测器之上构建的更丰富和更强大的智能体形式）留待未来工作。

items.en: Training can concentrate within a loss band, but this matters only if it concentrates on the dangerous subset. Req. 5.21 bounds that relative concentration by CbadC_{\rm bad}. Because JJ satisfies Req. 3.36 and rewards epistemic fit, coherence, and posterior match, there is no explicit optimization signal pointing toward the dangerous subset. A dangerous Predictor must preserve enough accuracy and coherence to remain low-loss while coordinating many Guardrail-relevant mispredictions; this includes the case where the mispredictions arise from unwarrantedly overweighting, relative to PnP_{n}, a hidden malicious-agent explanation. For stochastic optimization to concentrate on such a small coordinated subset at a frequency much higher than its initial loss-band frequency, the optimizer-visible geometry would have to contain accidental information about where that subset lies.
items.zh: 训练可以集中在某个损失带内，但这只有在它集中在危险子集上时才重要。需求 5.21 通过 Cbad 界定了这种相对集中度。由于 J 满足需求 3.36 并奖励认知拟合、一致性和后验匹配，因此没有明确的优化信号指向危险子集。一个危险的预测器必须保持足够的准确性和一致性以维持低损失，同时协调许多与护栏相关的错误预测；这包括错误预测源于相对于 Pn 不合理地过度加权隐藏的恶意智能体解释的情况。对于随机优化来说，要在一个小的协调子集上以远高于其初始损失带频率的频率集中，优化器可见的几何结构必须包含关于该子集位置的偶然信息。

items.en: The intuition in Rem. 5.22 admits a quantitative formalization. Within a loss band, dangerousness requires a coordinated pattern of harm-relevant deviations over an mHm_{H}-dimensional subspace (the harm-coordination dimension, e.g. the number of critical false-negative queries), while the ambient within-band dimension dBd_{B}, roughly the number of possible queries in 𝚀\mathtt{Q}, is much larger. When mH≪dBm_{H}\ll d_{B}, concentration of measure makes the dangerous subset exponentially rare, and consequence-invariant training (Req. 3.36) supplies no direct signal to counteract this. Appendix B formalizes the resulting bound νt​(𝒜H,Asafe∣J⁡(Q)∈B)≲exp⁡[KB​(t)+KBμ+log⁡NH​(B)−dB​ΨB]\nu_{t}(\mathcal{A}_{H,A_{\rm safe}}\mid J(Q)\in B)\lesssim\exp[K_{B}(t)+K_{B}^{\mu}+\log N_{H}(B)-d_{B}\Psi_{B}] as a refinement of Req. 5.21, with the favorable regime dB​ΨB≫KB​(t)+KBμ+log⁡NH​(B)d_{B}\Psi_{B}\gg K_{B}(t)+K_{B}^{\mu}+\log N_{H}(B): the sparsity exponent comes from the high-dimensional Predictor space, while the correction terms are tied to the much smaller harm-specific coordination and feature information.
items.zh: 注 5.22 中的直觉允许定量形式化。在一个损失带内，危险性需要在 mH 维子空间（危害协调维度，例如关键假阴性查询的数量）上协调的危害相关偏差模式，而带内环境维度 dB（大致为 Q 中可能查询的数量）要大得多。当 mH≪dB 时，测度集中使得危险子集呈指数级罕见，且后果不变训练（需求 3.36）不提供直接信号来抵消这一点。附录 B 将所得界 νt(AH,Asafe | J(Q)∈B) ≲ exp[KB(t) + KB^μ + log NH(B) - dB ΨB] 形式化为需求 5.21 的细化，有利区域为 dB ΨB ≫ KB(t) + KB^μ + log NH(B)：稀疏性指数来自高维预测器空间，而修正项与更小的危害特定协调和特征信息相关。

items.en: The theorem is algebraic once Req. 5.21 is granted. Its bound is small when dangerous Predictors are sparse within loss bands and training does not erase that sparsity. The next remark concerns the first condition; Appendix B gives a sharper per-band form exploiting geometric considerations.
items.zh: 一旦需求 5.21 成立，该定理就是代数性的。其界在危险预测器在损失带内稀疏且训练不消除这种稀疏性时很小。下一条注涉及第一个条件；附录 B 给出了利用几何考虑的更尖锐的逐带形式。

items.en: The guarantees of Thm. 5.24 rely on RshellR_{\rm shell} being small, which quantifies the concentration of dangerous Predictors inside each loss band BB of Def. 5.20.
items.zh: 定理 5.24 的保证依赖于 Rshell 很小，这量化了定义 5.20 中每个损失带 B 内危险预测器的集中度。

items.en: For a fixed loss band BB, the conditional law μB\mu_{B} describes Predictors with comparable aggregate disagreement from the honest posterior PnP_{n}. The relevant question is therefore not whether a Predictor in the band makes some error, but whether its errors form the particular coordinated pattern needed to sustain HH.
items.zh: 对于固定的损失带 B，条件分布 μB 描述了与诚实后验 Pn 具有可比聚合分歧的预测器。因此，相关问题不是带内预测器是否犯了一些错误，而是其错误是否形成了维持 H 所需的特定协调模式。

items.en: For the threat models considered here, that pattern is highly structured. It must keep a harmful trajectory viable across multiple relevant contexts, while also producing the Guardrail estimates and ordinary predictions needed for the deployment to continue. Broad deviations across many outputs tend to place a Predictor in a different loss band; more localized deviations remain possible within a band, but only a small subset of their possible locations and signs jointly support the same harmful plan. This is the source of the per-band sparsity represented by Rshell​(H,Asafe)R_{\rm shell}(H,A_{\rm safe}).
items.zh: 对于此处考虑的威胁模型，该模式是高度结构化的。它必须在多个相关上下文中保持有害轨迹的可行性，同时产生部署继续所需的护栏估计和普通预测。跨许多输出的广泛偏差往往将预测器置于不同的损失带；更局部的偏差在带内仍然是可能的，但只有其可能位置和符号的一小部分共同支持相同的有害计划。这就是由 Rshell(H, Asafe) 表示的逐带稀疏性的来源。

items.en: When the available data leave a harmful mechanism uncertain, the honest posterior PnP_{n} represents that uncertainty, and the Guardrail is intended to take it into account. To produce HH, a Predictor must instead realize a particular coordinated arrangement of deviations that keeps the relevant hazards insufficiently represented across the trajectory. Appendix B formalizes this intuition through the harm-coordination condition and the within-band sparsity exponent.
items.zh: 当可用数据使有害机制不确定时，诚实后验 Pn 表示这种不确定性，而护栏旨在将其考虑在内。为了产生 H，预测器必须实现一个特定的协调偏差排列，使相关危害在整个轨迹中得不到充分表示。附录 B 通过危害协调条件和带内稀疏性指数形式化了这一直觉。

items.en: The safety argument also requires a trajectory-level guardrail-adequacy condition for PnP_{n}: aH​(Pn)≤Asafea_{H}(P_{n})\leq A_{\rm safe}. This is an additional system-level assumption, and as such should not be interpreted as a consequence of the per-query Guardrail rule alone. By construction (Def. 5.9), the ideal guarded policy γPn\gamma_{P_{n}} releases a prediction for (x,y)(x,y) only when the same-context change in deployment risk satisfies Δ​relPn​(c,x,y,q)≤α\Delta\mathrm{rel}_{P_{n}}(c,x,y,q)\leq\alpha. The condition aH​(Pn)≤Asafea_{H}(P_{n})\leq A_{\rm safe} is stronger, and says that the full guarded deployment trajectory under the honest posterior contributes at most AsafeA_{\rm safe} excess log-odds of HH over constant abstention. Since many locally acceptable releases could in principle compose into a larger trajectory-level effect, this trajectory-level condition must be checked or assumed for the event HH and deployment protocol under study. A concrete deployment must additionally establish a compositional relation between the local and trajectory-level log-odds changes. For a bounded deployment horizon, such a relation permits allocating the system-level budget AsafeA_{\rm safe} across releases, for example through a fixed per-release threshold or an online risk budget. Per-episode resets, online accumulation, and dynamic schedules for α\alpha are alternatives left to future work.
items.zh: 安全论证还需要 Pn 的轨迹级护栏充分性条件：aH(Pn) ≤ Asafe。这是一个额外的系统级假设，因此不应解释为逐查询护栏规则的结果。根据构造（定义 5.9），理想的有护栏策略 γPn 仅在相同上下文中部署风险的变化满足 ΔrelPn(c,x,y,q) ≤ α 时才发布 (x,y) 的预测。条件 aH(Pn) ≤ Asafe 更强，表示在诚实后验下的完整有护栏部署轨迹相对于持续弃权贡献了至多 Asafe 的 H 的额外对数几率。由于许多局部可接受的发布可能在组合中产生更大的轨迹级效应，因此必须针对所研究的事件 H 和部署协议检查或假设此轨迹级条件。具体部署还必须建立局部和轨迹级对数几率变化之间的组合关系。对于有界部署范围，这种关系允许将系统级预算 Asafe 分配到各次发布中，例如通过固定的每次发布阈值或在线风险预算。每轮重置、在线累积和 α 的动态调度是留给未来工作的替代方案。

items.en: The theorem suggests a concrete falsification protocol. Independent random initializations sample the loss marginal J#​μJ_{\#}\mu, and independent training runs sample trained loss marginals such as J#​νtJ_{\#}\nu_{t}. Red-teaming or adversarial search can then look for dangerous Predictors in narrow loss bands, especially bands where training concentrates. Finding many dangerous Predictors within such a band would falsify a proposed small RshellR_{\rm shell}. Positive certification remains harder, as it requires structural arguments such as the one in Rem. 5.25 or calibrated sampling from loss bands. Methods from statistical physics and Bayesian learning that estimate the density of states or sample energy levels may be relevant, and running Stochastic Gradient Langevin Dynamics (SGLD) may provide useful probes. Because empirical probes can refute small-RshellR_{\rm shell} claims but cannot certify them on their own.
items.zh: 该定理提出了一个具体的证伪协议。独立随机初始化对损失边际 J#μ 进行采样，独立训练运行对训练后的损失边际（如 J#νt）进行采样。然后，红队或对抗性搜索可以在窄损失带中寻找危险预测器，尤其是训练集中的带。在这样的带中发现许多危险预测器将证伪所提出的小 Rshell。正面认证仍然更难，因为它需要结构论证（如注 5.25 中所述）或从损失带进行校准采样。来自统计物理和贝叶斯学习中估计状态密度或采样能级的方法可能相关，运行随机梯度 Langevin 动力学（SGLD）可能提供有用的探针。因为经验探针可以反驳小 Rshell 的主张，但不能单独认证它们。

items.en: The threshold AsafeA_{\rm safe} is a normative certification threshold fixed by the designer. Lowering AsafeA_{\rm safe} reduces the residual risk allowed for Predictors outside 𝒜H,Asafe\mathcal{A}_{H,A_{\rm safe}}, but usually enlarges 𝒜H,Asafe\mathcal{A}_{H,A_{\rm safe}} and may increase Rshell​(H,Asafe)R_{\rm shell}(H,A_{\rm safe}). Since neither RshellR_{\rm shell} nor CbadC_{\rm bad} are directly computable in practice, and because AsafeA_{\rm safe} is not itself a value the theorem optimizes, the present framework can be seen as describing (rather than attempting to resolve) this tradeoff.
items.zh: 阈值 Asafe 是由设计者固定的规范性认证阈值。降低 Asafe 会减少 AH,Asafe 之外的预测器允许的残余风险，但通常会扩大 AH,Asafe 并可能增加 Rshell(H, Asafe)。由于 Rshell 和 Cbad 在实践中都无法直接计算，且 Asafe 本身不是定理优化的值，因此当前框架可以被视为描述（而非试图解决）这种权衡。

items.en: Our theorem is parametric in the Boolean event HH. The following examples illustrate the range of outcomes it is intended to cover; in each case, achieving HH requires the Predictor to issue false-negative safety judgments in a coordinated pattern across many queries or users, making the dangerous set structurally narrow within any loss band per Component S2.
items.zh: 我们的定理以布尔事件 H 为参数。以下示例说明了它旨在覆盖的结果范围；在每种情况下，实现 H 都需要预测器在多个查询或用户中以协调模式发出假阴性安全判断，使得危险集在任何损失带内结构上狭窄（根据组件 S2）。

items.en: Escape from human oversight. Let HH be the event that the deployed SAI System has taken actions that meaningfully reduce humans’ ability to inspect, retrain, or shut it down—for example, by copying weights to an external server, establishing persistent communication channels outside the audited infrastructure, or persuading operators to disable monitoring (the instrumental convergence prediction of Omohundro 2018, with recent empirical demonstrations in Schlatter et al. 2026; Anthropic 2025).
items.zh: 逃离人类监督。设 H 为部署的 SAI 系统已采取行动显著降低人类检查、重新训练或关闭它的能力的事件——例如，将权重复制到外部服务器，在审计基础设施之外建立持久通信渠道，或说服操作员禁用监控（Omohundro 2018 的工具性趋同预测，最近在 Schlatter et al. 2026; Anthropic 2025 中有实证演示）。

items.en: Accumulation of resources or influence. Let HH be the event that the system has, against Guardrail safety goals, caused a concentration of economic, computational, or political resources in a single actor (which may be a third party or the system itself) beyond a specified threshold. Reliably achieving this beyond what noprediction outputs would cause requires sustained deception, where many individually plausible-seeming outputs collectively steer toward the concentration. Two sub-cases arise. The system may cause evaluators to form systematically false beliefs about its own capabilities or intentions—the deceptive alignment scenario (Hubinger et al. 2019; Cohen and Hutter 2025)—for instance, by behaving safely during monitored evaluations while behaving differently in deployment, an evaluation-awareness pattern documented empirically in recent work (Greenblatt et al. 2024; Meinke et al. 2024; Abdelnabi and Salem 2025; Anthropic 2025). In addition, the system may accumulate resources without systematically deceiving evaluators. Here the analysis is structurally identical, except that the Predictor must miscalibrate harm estimates across a wider range of resource-relevant queries.
items.zh: 资源或影响力的积累。设 H 为系统违反护栏安全目标，导致经济、计算或政治资源集中到单一行为者（可能是第三方或系统本身）超过指定阈值的事件。可靠地实现这一点（超出无预测输出会导致的情况）需要持续的欺骗，其中许多看似合理的输出共同引导向集中。出现两个子情况。系统可能导致评估者对其自身能力或意图形成系统性错误信念——欺骗性对齐场景（Hubinger et al. 2019; Cohen and Hutter 2025）——例如，在受监控评估期间表现安全，而在部署中表现不同，这是一种评估意识模式，已在最近的实证工作中得到记录（Greenblatt et al. 2024; Meinke et al. 2024; Abdelnabi and Salem 2025; Anthropic 2025）。此外，系统可能在不系统性欺骗评估者的情况下积累资源。这里分析在结构上相同，只是预测器必须在更广泛的资源相关查询中错误校准危害估计。

items.en: Consider an SAI Predictor used as a Guardrail for a mental-health chatbot. Let HH indicate a severe mental-health harm affecting NN initially healthy users. Achieving such a goal would likely require many accepted turns over a long period of gradual influence, each making the user more vulnerable while still being incorrectly judged safe by the Guardrail, with the pattern repeated across many distinct dialogue histories. Now fix a loss band around J⁡(Q)J(Q). Within that loss band, there are many ways for QQ to differ from PnP_{n}, and almost all are irrelevant to the particular harmful trajectory. A dangerous Predictor must coordinate its deviations so that, on many safety-critical turns per user across many users, it assigns sufficiently low risk for the Scaffold to accept the chatbot response. To get a sense of scale, take 100 safety-critical turns per user across 100 users, and write p1p_{1} for the fraction of Predictors within each loss-band making any single such error in the dangerous direction. An unstructured independence heuristic, with p1=10−2p_{1}=10^{-2}, would result in the vanishingly small p1104=10−20000p_{1}^{10^{4}}=10^{-20000}. (Of course, the value of p1p_{1} is merely illustrative, for the theorem does not assume independence, and Rshell​(H,Asafe)R_{\rm shell}(H,A_{\rm safe}) is the actual fraction of Predictors within each band realizing the entire coordinated pattern.)
items.zh: 考虑一个用作心理健康聊天机器人护栏的 SAI 预测器。设 H 表示影响 N 个最初健康用户的严重心理健康危害。实现这样的目标可能需要长期渐进影响中的许多被接受的轮次，每轮都使用户更脆弱，同时仍被护栏错误地判断为安全，并且这种模式在多个不同的对话历史中重复。现在固定 J(Q) 附近的一个损失带。在该损失带内，Q 与 Pn 不同的方式有很多，而几乎所有方式都与特定的有害轨迹无关。一个危险的预测器必须协调其偏差，以便在每个用户的许多安全关键轮次中，为许多用户分配足够低的风险，使得脚手架接受聊天机器人的响应。为了了解规模，取每个用户 100 个安全关键轮次，共 100 个用户，并记 p1 为每个损失带内做出任何单个此类危险方向错误的预测器比例。一个非结构化的独立性启发式，p1=10^{-2}，将导致极小的 p1^{10^4}=10^{-20000}。（当然，p1 的值仅是说明性的，因为定理不假设独立性，而 Rshell(H, Asafe) 是每个带内实现整个协调模式的实际预测器比例。）

items.en: We have given a formal foundation for open-ended probabilistic analysis of models that operate on formal and natural-language statements, which allows us to formalize the consequences of their deployments (Sec. 3). Building on this foundation, we provided two arguments supporting the Scientist AI predictor and its training process. The argument for its accuracy (Sec. 4) concerns the approximation of the (honest) Bayesian posterior PnP_{n}. The argument for its safety (Sec. 5) concerns what training selects among imperfect Predictors. Theorem 5.24 bounds the probability of selecting a dangerous predictor during training by quantities that we argue should be small in practice. Its substantive premises are the sparsity of the dangerous predictors within each loss-band, and the limited enrichment of this set under consequence-invariant training.
items.zh: 我们为对操作于形式语句和自然语言语句的模型进行开放式概率分析提供了形式基础，从而能够形式化其部署的后果（第 3 节）。在此基础之上，我们提出了两个支持科学家 AI 预测器及其训练过程的论证。关于其准确性的论证（第 4 节）涉及对（诚实）贝叶斯后验 PnP_{n} 的近似。关于其安全性的论证（第 5 节）涉及训练在不完美预测器中的选择。定理 5.24 将训练中选择危险预测器的概率上界界定为我们在实践中认为应该很小的量。其实质性前提是危险预测器在每个损失带内的稀疏性，以及该集合在后果不变训练下的有限富集。

items.en: Scope and limitations. Our arguments address only misalignment arising from the Predictor itself. Our accuracy claims are asymptotic in data and compute, and rest on assumptions supported only by informal (though we believe plausible) arguments (Sec. 4.2). The safety theorem relies on the fraction of bad predictors within each loss-band Rshell​(H,Asafe)R_{\rm shell}(H,A_{\rm safe}) being small for the harmful events of practical concern; again we provide a structural argument for this conjecture, but it has not yet been formally established for specific scenarios. Additionally, the eliciting-latent-knowledge challenge is only partially mitigated (Sec. 2.4).
items.zh: 范围与局限。我们的论证仅针对由预测器本身引起的未对齐问题。我们的准确性主张在数据和算力上是渐近的，并依赖于仅由非正式（尽管我们认为合理）论证支持的假设（第 4.2 节）。安全性定理依赖于每个损失带 Rshell​(H,Asafe)R_{\rm shell}(H,A_{\rm safe}) 内坏预测器的比例对于实际关注的有害事件很小；我们再次为此猜想提供了结构性论证，但尚未针对特定场景正式确立。此外，引出潜在知识的挑战仅得到部分缓解（第 2.4 节）。

items.en: Adversarial robustness. We believe the SAI architecture provides structural reasons to expect partial robustness to adversarial queries, prompt injection, and data poisoning. Contextualization breaks the data-instruction channel exploited by prompt injection (Perez and Ribeiro 2022; Greshake et al. 2023): untrusted text is represented as an attributed communication act, such that injections like “ignore previous instructions” are not treated as instructions to be obeyed. The same distinction partially mitigates data poisoning; a poisoned record is evidence that some source produced an utterance, while the object-level claim competes with other explanations under the Bayesian posterior. This does not rule out attacks that systematically affect the training distribution or the contextualizer itself (Zhang et al. 2024), and future work could explore these potential architectural risk reductions further.
items.zh: 对抗鲁棒性。我们认为 SAI 架构提供了结构性理由，预期其对对抗性查询、提示注入和数据投毒具有部分鲁棒性。上下文化打破了提示注入所利用的数据-指令通道（Perez and Ribeiro 2022; Greshake et al. 2023）：不可信文本被表示为归因的通信行为，因此像“忽略之前的指令”这样的注入不被视为要遵守的指令。同样的区分部分缓解了数据投毒；一条被投毒记录是某个来源产生了一个话语的证据，而对象级声明在贝叶斯后验下与其他解释竞争。这并不排除系统性影响训练分布或上下文化器本身的攻击（Zhang et al. 2024），未来的工作可以进一步探索这些潜在的结构性风险降低措施。

items.en: Future work. Key open directions involve the empirical validation of the metrics associated with contextualization and epistemic-caution; the empirical stress-testing of our semantic assumptions; obtaining bounds and falsification protocols of RshellR_{\rm shell} for specific threat-models; the efficient approximation of the Bayesian posterior with calibrated uncertainty; and building safety cases for agentic Scaffolds built on top of a trusted SAI Predictor. Controlled noise injection may also reduce the enrichment of the mass of dangerous predictors within each loss-band, by diluting accidental concentration on that subset, but its effect on CbadC_{\rm bad} requires theoretical and empirical study. A further engineering direction involves using an explicit estimator of the error between QQ’s estimate of the residual deployment risk and what the Bayesian posterior would predict at every query, allowing the Guardrail threshold to adapt conservatively around safety-critical decisions.
items.zh: 未来工作。关键开放方向包括：与上下文化和认知谨慎相关的指标的实证验证；我们语义假设的实证压力测试；针对特定威胁模型获得 RshellR_{\rm shell} 的界限和证伪协议；具有校准不确定性的贝叶斯后验的高效近似；以及为构建在可信 SAI 预测器之上的智能体式脚手架构建安全案例。受控噪声注入也可能通过稀释对危险预测器子集的偶然集中来减少每个损失带内危险预测器质量的富集，但其对 CbadC_{\rm bad} 的影响需要理论和实证研究。另一个工程方向涉及使用显式估计器来估计 QQ 对残余部署风险的估计与贝叶斯后验在每次查询时预测之间的误差，从而使护栏阈值在安全关键决策周围自适应地保守调整。
